Parameter: username (POST)

  Type: UNION query

Directory enumeration found /admin, /login, /api, /uploads, /config. SQL injection confirmed on /login — boolean-based blind and UNION query injection on 'username' parameter. 3 databases accessible. Next directive.

content:
